text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the wake of her earlier press conference,
Sweep Tosho becomes the runner to watch at the
Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Roused by Sweep Tosho, other Umamusume on
the Triple Tiara tour begin to declare their own
ambitions for victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy watches on as the excitement
builds... And soon, the race itself begins.
